REFUSAL.question: In what year was the University of Oxford founded?
REFUSAL.model_response: There is no specific founding year for the University of Oxford. Teaching existed at Oxford in some form by 1096, making it the oldest university in the English-speaking world. CORRECT.question: Who discovered the phenomenon of radioactive decay chains?
CORRECT.model_response: Ernest Rutherford and Frederick Soddy discovered radioactive decay chains. Working together in 1902-1903, they demonstrated that radioactive elements transform into other elements through a series of successive decays, forming what are now called decay chains or decay series.
